{gifts.map(gifts => { return(
< div className="box" id = {gifts.id}> gifts Image : {gifts.Image}
gifts Name : {gifts.Name}
Theme Price : {gifts.Price}
gifts Quantity : {gifts.Quantitiy}

) })}

} export default addGifts;
